common.tagline: File your ITR online — simply, securely.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use your mobile or email to get a one-time code.

landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your Form 16, let us compute old vs new regime, and e-file with confidence. Built for salaried, freelancers, professionals and MSMEs in India.
landing.featureWizardBody: Answer plain-language questions. We map them to the right ITR behind the scenes.
landing.featureRegimeTitle: Old vs New, side by side
landing.featureRegimeBody: We compute both regimes and recommend the one that saves you more.
landing.featureSecureBody: Your PAN and financial data are encrypted and stored in India.
landing.featureExpertBody: Self-file, or route your return to a Chartered Accountant for a final check.

wizard.updatedReturnHint: An updated return (ITR-U) lets you disclose income up to 48 months after the assessment year, paying additional tax u/s 140B. Available on ITR-2 / ITR-3.

income.businessModeHint: Presumptive estimates profit at a fixed rate of turnover.
income.natureCodeHint: The ITD business/profession code. Leave blank to use a default for the section.
income.accountingMethodHint: The method your books follow (Schedule PARTA disclosure).
income.goodsCarriageHint: ₹1,000 per ton per month for heavy vehicles (> 12t), or ₹7,500/month for lighter ones.
income.financialParticularsHint: The no-account-case balance sheet ITR-4/ITR-3 disclose: capital, loans, debtors, stock, cash.
income.netProfitHint: Enter a minus sign for a loss (e.g. −3,00,000) — it is set off against other heads and carried forward.
income.speculativeHint: Intraday equity trading is speculative business.

eVerify.overdueBody: The 30-day window (until {date}) has passed. Verify now to avoid your return being treated as not filed.

refund.noRefundBody: Your return was processed and accepted as filed — nothing is due either way.
refund.adjustedBody: Your refund of {amount} was set off against an outstanding demand (s.245).

settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile, privacy and preferences.

settings.contactChangeHint: To change your email or mobile, verify the new contact with an OTP from the filing flow.
settings.consentsSubtitle: Control how your data is used. Withdraw any optional consent anytime.
settings.consentsFootnote: Essential consents are required to provide the filing service and cannot be withdrawn while a return is in progress. Each change is recorded as a dated consent receipt (DPDP Act 2023).

help.pageSubtitle: Answers to common questions about filing with TallyG Tax.

whichItr.q: Which ITR form should I file?
whichItr.a: You don’t have to decide — answer a few plain-language questions in the wizard and we recommend the right form (ITR-1 to ITR-4) based on your income sources.

regime.q: Old or new tax regime — which is better for me?
regime.a: We compute your tax under both regimes and recommend the one that saves you more. You can override the recommendation before filing.

documentsNeeded.a: Typically your Form 16, Form 26AS and AIS/TIS, plus proofs for any deductions (80C/80D) and bank statements. Upload what you have and we’ll guide you.

editAfterFile.q: Can I change my return after filing?
editAfterFile.a: Once filed, a return can’t be edited, but you can file a revised return within the allowed window if you spot a mistake.

cryptoVda.q: How do I report cryptocurrency / crypto gains?
cryptoVda.a: Under s.115BBH every crypto or NFT sale is taxed at a flat 30% — only the cost of acquisition can be deducted, no expense or exemption is allowed, and a loss cannot be set off against any other income. Add each trade as a capital gain with asset type 'Crypto/VDA' in the Income step; the app will emit the mandatory Schedule VDA and route it to ITR-2 or ITR-3.

salaryArrears.q: I received salary / pension arrears — will I pay extra tax?
salaryArrears.a: Arrears bunched into one year can push you into a higher slab. s.89(1) provides relief: use the Form 10E calculator on this page (scroll down) to estimate how much of the extra tax is forgiven. File Form 10E on the income-tax portal before claiming the relief in your return.

advanceTax.q: Do I need to pay advance tax?
advanceTax.a: Yes, if your total tax after TDS/TCS credit exceeds ₹10,000 you must pay in quarterly instalments (by 15 Jun/15 Sep/15 Dec/15 Mar). If you miss or underpay, s.234B and s.234C interest applies at 1% per month on the shortfall. Add your advance-tax challans in the Summary step.

aisReconciliation.q: What is the AIS/26AS reconciliation and why does it matter?
aisReconciliation.a: The Income Tax Department's AIS (Annual Information Statement) and Form 26AS record every income and tax credit reported for your PAN. If your return under-reports income relative to what the department knows, you'll get a §143(1) mismatch notice. Upload your AIS and Form 26AS in the Documents step; the app cross-checks your return and flags gaps before you file.

form16.q: How do I use my Form 16?
form16.a: Upload it to the document vault. We extract your salary, TDS and exemptions automatically, and you confirm the figures before they’re used.

uploadSafe.a: Yes. Documents are encrypted, stored in India, and only used to prepare your return. You can withdraw the OCR consent in Settings.

extractionWrong.q: What if the extracted figures look wrong?
extractionWrong.a: Every extracted field is shown for your review. Low-confidence fields are flagged so you can correct them before they touch your return.

whenPay.q: When do I pay the filing fee?
whenPay.a: After we compute your return and you’ve reviewed the summary — just before e-filing. No money is taken without a filing attempt.

refundFee.q: Do I get a refund if filing fails?
refundFee.a: Yes. The pay-then-file flow guarantees that a paid return either e-files or is fully refunded.

invoice.a: A GST invoice is generated for every successful payment and is available on the Payments page.

dataStored.a: All personal and financial data is stored encrypted in India (AWS Mumbai), aligned with the DPDP Act 2023.

panSafe.a: Your PAN is encrypted at rest and only ever shown masked (e.g. ABCDE****F). The plaintext is never displayed.

deleteAccount.q: Can I delete my account and data?
deleteAccount.a: You can request erasure from Settings → Your data rights. Filed-return records are retained only for the statutory period required by law, then purged.

help.contactBody: Raise a ticket and our team will get back to you.
help.trustBody: 256-bit encryption · Data stored in India · DPDP-compliant.
